---
title: "Sentiment Lexicon Comparison"
output: html_document
---

```{r setup, message=FALSE}
library(tidyverse)
library(tidytext)
library(readr)
library(ggplot2)
library(here)
```

## Load data

```{r}
df <- read_csv(here::here("data", "sample", "sample_texts.csv"))
head(df)
```

## Tokenize text

```{r}
tidy_df <- df %>%
  unnest_tokens(word, text)

head(tidy_df)
```

## Apply AFINN

```{r}
afinn_scores <- tidy_df %>%
  inner_join(get_sentiments("afinn"), by = "word") %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(afinn_score = sum(value), .groups = "drop")

afinn_scores
```

## Apply Bing and NRC

```{r}
bing_scores <- tidy_df %>%
  inner_join(get_sentiments("bing"), by = "word") %>%
  mutate(score = ifelse(sentiment == "positive", 1, -1)) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(bing_score = sum(score), .groups = "drop")

nrc_scores <- tidy_df %>%
  inner_join(get_sentiments("nrc"), by = "word") %>%
  filter(sentiment %in% c("positive", "negative")) %>%
  mutate(score = ifelse(sentiment == "positive", 1, -1)) %>%
  group_by(id) %>%
  summarise(nrc_score = sum(score), .groups = "drop")
```

## Compare outputs

```{r}
comparison <- df %>%
  left_join(afinn_scores, by = "id") %>%
  left_join(bing_scores, by = "id") %>%
  left_join(nrc_scores, by = "id") %>%
  mutate(across(c(afinn_score, bing_score, nrc_score), ~replace_na(., 0)))

comparison
```

## Plot comparison

```{r}
plot_data <- comparison %>%
  select(id, afinn_score, bing_score, nrc_score) %>%
  pivot_longer(cols = -id, names_to = "lexicon", values_to = "score")

ggplot(plot_data, aes(x = factor(id), y = score, fill = lexicon)) +
  geom_col(position = "dodge") +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    title = "Sentiment Scores by Lexicon",
    x = "Text ID",
    y = "Sentiment Score"
  )
```
